scripts.build:safari: tsc --noEmit && BROWSER=safari vite build && node scripts/build-safari.mjs
scripts.build:all: npm run build:chrome && npm run build:firefox && npm run build:safari
scripts.package: npm run build && node scripts/package-extension.mjs chrome
scripts.package:firefox: npm run build:firefox && node scripts/package-extension.mjs firefox
scripts.package:safari: npm run build:safari && node scripts/package-extension.mjs safari
